prompt: A clean 2x3 photo grid collage of six real candid photographs of the same black Labrador Retriever puppy with a red bandana, all cozy farmhouse indoor life themed. Thin white borders between panels. (1) dog curled up on warm wooden floorboards by a rustic farmhouse window, soft afternoon golden light streaming in, eyes closed, completely relaxed; (2) dog peeking curiously around a half-open aged wooden door inside the farmhouse, only head and one paw visible around the door edge, mischievous expression; (3) dog lying on a cozy plaid blanket in a dog bed, chin resting on paws, looking directly at camera, warm lamp light, hay bales softly blurred in background; (4) dog playing tug-of-war with a thick rope toy on the farmhouse wooden floor, pulling hard, ears flopping, full of energy; (5) dog sitting beside a warm glowing amber table lamp at night, soft warm light illuminating its fur, calm and cozy atmosphere, dark farmhouse interior; (6) dog sitting by a rain-streaked farmhouse window, looking out pensively at the rainy farm, reflections in the glass, moody soft light. All same black Lab, red bandana. Warm cozy indoor farm lighting. Real photography style.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, CGI, human faces, multiple dogs, harsh studio lighting, oversaturated, digital art, watermark, outdoor settings
